headline: NASA selects Eric Schmidt's rocket company for a 2028 mission to Mars
summary: NASA selected Relativity Space, led by Eric Schmidt, for a 2028 Mars mission. The company will send the Aeolus payload to Mars. Relativity Space provides the spacecraft, rocket, and operations under a new partnership.

headline: Hue's wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
summary: Philips Hue introduced wired wall modules to integrate non-smart lights. These modules install behind existing wall switches, expanding the Hue ecosystem. New Play lamps and updated E14 candle bulbs were also launched.

headline: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio and Atonemo unveiled a dedicated player for NTS mixes and stations. The player connects to nearly any stereo setup, enhancing internet radio listening. It also supports AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify Connect, and Tidal Connect.

headline: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
summary: Amazon MGM has reportedly dropped "Artificial," a film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. The movie covered the intense five days of Altman's 2023 termination and reinstatement. Andrew Garfield was set to star in the biopic.

headline: Beat the Summer Heat With This $8 Portable Turbo Fan
summary: An $8 portable turbo fan deal is available to help beat summer heat. This compact device offers effective personal cooling. It's a budget-friendly way to stay frosty.

headline: Save $100 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: Save $100 on BowFlex Results Series SelectTech adjustable dumbbells. This deal is available ahead of Amazon Prime Day. Delivery is still possible by Father's Day with free shipping.

headline: Save 50% Off a 12-Month Walmart+ Membership for Prime Day and Stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup
summary: Get 50% off a 12-month Walmart+ membership for Prime Day. Enjoy benefits like free shipping, early access to deals, and Paramount+. Stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup directly with your membership.

headline: Save Nearly 60% Off the Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set, Perfect for Forza Horizon 6 on PC
summary: The Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Pedal Set is nearly 60% off. It's ideal for PC racing games like Forza Horizon 6. This refurbished set comes with a 1-year Logitech warranty.

headline: Video shows scene of Bedford train crash as passenger describes aftermath
summary: A video reveals the scene of a recent train crash in Bedford. A passenger recounted the terrifying aftermath, comparing it to a "bomb explosion." The footage provides a stark look at the incident's immediate impact.

headline: What we know so far about Bedford train crash
summary: Two East Midland Railway trains collided in Bedford. Emergency services quickly arrived at the scene of the incident. Investigations are ongoing to determine the full details and causes.

headline: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
summary: The Prime Minister is under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers. They are urging for a clear timetable regarding an upcoming "exit." The transport secretary is reportedly advising Starmer on this crucial decision.

headline: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
summary: The US announced a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hezbollah. The deal aims to prevent escalation and protect a wider US-Iran agreement. Reports of continued strikes in Lebanon emerged despite the ceasefire announcement.
